ideation: This sequence simulates a person speaking, using hand gestures to emphasize the act of communication. The robot will use both arms to create a natural and engaging animation.  The arms will move in a way that suggests the flow of speech and the expression of ideas.  The sequence will start with a relaxed posture, then transition to gestures that mimic the act of speaking, and finally return to a calm state.  The left arm will mostly remain near the body, while the right arm will be more expressive.  I'll consult the provided examples to ensure smooth transitions and natural movements.

frames.beat: the left arm stays put, the right begins to gesture outward
the right arm pulls back, emphasizing a point
both arms return to a resting, speaking pose
